summary: The diff addresses REQ-1 by fixing the admin authorization failure in UsersControlsPanel. Key changes include: (1) PINAuthGuard now stores the PIN as 'caffeineAdminToken' in sessionStorage and invalidates cached actor/allUsers queries on successful authentication, (2) useQueries.ts uses useAdminActor for admin-specific queries, and (3) backend/main.mo maintains Motoko authorization logic. The fix ensures the admin actor is initialized with the secret token before fetching users. All changes respect the file modification constraints.
